/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/msg_logger.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmsg_logger.so -o libmsg_logger.so CMakeFiles/msg_logger.dir/msg_logger_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msg_logger.dir/msg_logger.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
